gates.name: private-store-outside-repo
gates.summary: Private scorer inputs are written outside the PoV repo.

gates.name: hash-only-public-commitment
gates.summary: Public commitment includes hashes, counts, scoring policy, and safety flags only.

gates.name: no-candidate-whitelist
gates.summary: Held-out cases use generic target/risk/cleanliness thresholds instead of a delta-id whitelist.

gates.name: bootstrap-claim-boundary
gates.summary: Report labels this as a scorer-only bootstrap until pre-registered before candidate selection.

claimBoundary.publicPositioning: Hash-only CEO-sim scorer bundle commitment. This is a local scorer smoke unless generated and frozen before candidate selection.
